text.tspan: This book shows small teams, agencies, and ops leads
how to turn scattered AI usage into a documented
system that improves speed and quality. It replaces
vague inspiration with a concrete structure that
makes the reader feel more prepared, more credible,
Priya North helps specialized operators turn hard-won experience
into clear offers, teachable systems, and premium client trust.

svg.text: Refined tech-editorial cover with layered grids and calm cyan highlights.
